channel.title: U.S. Courts — Pending Rules and Forms Amendments
channel.description: Judiciary-wide status page for pending amendments to the Federal Rules of Civil, Criminal, Appellate, Bankruptcy, and Evidence procedure — the rules that govern every federal case in the District of Maine and the First Circuit. Prose/link page with no repeating dated list, monitored by full-page fingerprint so amendment postings surface as change items.

item.title: Monitoring started: U.S. Courts — Pending Rules and Forms Amendments
item.description: This source is being monitored for changes. No update has been detected yet; a new item will appear here the next time the page changes. This placeholder confirms the feed is live.
